modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: New employee needs USD account and door access card.

full_description_text: New staff member hired, but no USD account or door card. Need help to set up these access things. Please assist with this process quickly.
short_description: New employee needs USD account and door access card.
description: New staff member hired, but no USD account or door card. Need help to set up these access things. Please assist with this process quickly.
